lines.text: Yeesh, this fog is giving me the creeps. I've got a bad feeling about this...
Huh… Wait, what's that huge shadow under the water?
Watch out!
Hmm... Wha... Huh? We docked already? Where is Brant and the crew?
You did? I didn't hear a thing.
Whoa, this is Ragunna, huh? How do we get into town?
I didn't know all the ships in Ragunna are Echoes. That troupe isn't as special as I thought...
Now I can't even imagine what kind of Echoes we might see in the city.
You're kidding me... Even in the Land of Echoes, I, Abby, will always be the most special one!
Hic!
Wow... are they all Echoes?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Now we're talking! This is what the Land of Echoes should look like! I thought all of Rinascita's Echoes were like that grumpy poker face we met at the docks...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Eh... Hi! I'm Abby. Nice to meet ya!
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Are you okay?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Now that I think about it, the frequency vibration I sensed felt a lot like... empathy.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Well, maybe telepathy? Not sure. It's hard to explain…
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: So the "Imperator" is the Sentinel. But who's the "Lost"? Plus, it said it needs your help, but… a Sentinel shouldn't need to ask for help, wouldn't ya say? Eh, something's not adding up, what a headache...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: So is this the statue of the Sentinel? Why does it feel weird...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Wingray?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: —Not Beppe. It's me. Abby!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Hic...! Lame. I was just trynna have some fun with her.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: How can that be? That Blessed Maiden... could she really be the Threnodian's Resonator? What if the Primus's words were a bunch of baloney?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: But we saw Cartethyia following the Sentinel's instructions... They wouldn't mix up Their own Resonator, right?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Ugh, now my head hurts... Who was she really with? The Sentinel? Or the Threnodian?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Well, probably won't get any more answers from him...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Wow! Is this real? Pinch me. I can't believe how different everything looks! So this is the Carnevale, huh?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I can't wait to explore! Oh, by the way, it's been a while since we last saw Zani and Phoebe. Wonder what they're up to right now...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: What happened to you?!
Your frequency's been leaking everywhere! I tried plugging it from the inside, but it didn't work.
Eurgh! No, this is no good... How about this!
It-it stopped... for now. I gotta... I gotta rest...
All four Melody Boxes are marked with different sigils… Know what they mean, {PlayerName}?
You know, that big mouth of yours is gonna get you in trouble sooner or later.
That makes the final box. Anything else you wanna do? Let us know.
Hmm… It says it wants to go back to its master's home and meet her brother, {PlayerName}.
But its travelled with its master for so long, it's not sure if its master's family moved some place else or not…
You're smarter than you look. Shocker!
Hey! I'm right here, you know? Show this Echo some respect!
When did you even send that message?!
*yawn* What's with the ruckus... Huh, what’s that in your hands?
Hmm... "Behold Hongzhen in its entirety, next to a ring and hanging eaves. When eternal snow thaw into flowing streams, let us reconvene."
Ooh... I see, I see...
I see I've got no clue at all!
I get the very last part, at least! She’s asking you out! Well that's a fancy way to write stuff...
And now... this next sentence, "eternal snow thaw into streams"... What is that supposed to mean?
How did you manage to get all that hidden meaning?
But the buildings in Hongzhen all look pretty much the same. Which one exactly was she talking about?
Makes sense. Lead the way!
Hey. Why are the people here so divided about Changli?
Hmm... You humans make everything so complicated.
Well, at least now we know what she wanted to say.
Now that’s much easier to understand. Why did she have to make it a whole riddle? *yawn*... I’m getting sleepy again.
Wow, it’s really huge now that we look at it.
It does look quiet. Should be a nice place for meetings... *yawn* Ugh, getting 'eepy again…
Wait... I smell Tacet Discords in that cave!
No... There's more... Tacet Discords, humans, and...
Smells like a whole bunch of messed up frequencies... It's so... familiar...
C’mon, after all we've been through, you still don't trust my sniffer? Be grateful, I'm giving you a warning!
I knew it, another invitation. That's kind of their signature, huh? But this wasn't Carlotta, who's this <color=yellow>Capollo</color> guy?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Oh, yeah. The big boss of the vault and all that jazz? Guess it won't hurt swinging by Carlotta's family. They do owe us a big one!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I remember now, didn't he get nabbed by the Order?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Then he's got a lot to thank you for. When that sneaky Priest tried to use him as a pawn, things could've gotten messy without you and Carlotta's quick thinking.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I bet he's got something good planned. A pile of money? Maybe a mega feast?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Ugh... hic! I've been feeling pretty weird lately, my head's all wobbly. I might not be able to show right when you need me!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Okay, you've got this. If anything happens, just smash your way through!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Alright, alright! No need to rub it in!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Anyway, I'll leave this to you then. But hey, if you ever need my help, just give me a shout, okay?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I knew it, another invitation. That's kind of their signature, huh? But this wasn't Carlotta, who's this <color=yellow>Capollo</color> guy?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Oh, yeah. The big boss of the vault and all that jazz? Guess it won't hurt swinging by Carlotta's family. They do owe us a big one!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I remember now, didn't he get nabbed by the Order?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Then he's got a lot to thank you for. When that sneaky Priest tried to use him as a pawn, things could've gotten messy without you and Carlotta's quick thinking.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I bet he's got something good planned. A pile of money? Maybe a mega feast?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Ugh... hic! I've been feeling pretty weird lately, my head's all wobbly. I might not be able to show right when you need me!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Okay, you've got this. If anything happens, just smash your way through!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Alright, alright! No need to rub it in!
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Anyway, I'll leave this to you then. But hey, if you ever need my help, just give me a shout, okay?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Phew! Finally, I can stick my head out! {PlayerName}, are you okay?!
I… wait, we're already in Septimont?
I was just talking to you, and then boom! It felt like something just... covered me!
First, it messed with my frequency, then... I just passed out. Wait! Cartethyia? And a girl I don't know?!
W-what happened while I was out?!
Mmm... Yummy, yummy!
Hello? Are you with me? {PlayerName}, you seem a bit distracted.
With so much delicious food right in front of you, aren't you gonna try any? Well if you're not interested, I'll gobble it all up!
You've been absent-minded the whole day. Still bothered by that dream from last night?
Wait, so you had a dream about the Sentinel? Like the one from your flashback when we saw the Sentinel statue after you lost your memory?
Hang on, let me get this straight... The Sentinel swooshed you off to a mountain shaped like a dragon...
And then there were all these bad things going on with lots and lots of Tacet Discords, but the Sentinel saved the day!
How exactly did it protect everyone again... Oh, in your dream it made the time different there?
It's no shock that you have awesome powers, being friends with me.
Hmm... What was that place you dreamed about called?
Mt. Firmament? Never heard of it...
Hold on! Did you just say Mt. Firmament?!
The southeast...
The past few days, especially this morning, I caught this unique smell from the southeast. From that mountain they just mentioned.
It's like a strong energy pulsing through the air, but I can't quite put my finger on it. It feels kind of weird though, doesn't smell natural...
Could it have anything to do with what you said? A place where time passes slowly?
Hmm... Do you wanna go check it out?
Then... Shall we go check it out together? It feels really suspicious.
I'm here.
I'm listening!
Hey, did you notice how the mountain has a strangely pleasant smell? It doesn't look edible though...
Not that I'm hungry or anything. I just tend to doze off easily. Feels like my body can only process what I consume while sleeping.
Well of course I'm reliable! Even if I do happen to fall asleep and can't hear you...
Of course you can! When I'm already so cool, you must be pretty amazing too!
And don't worry, if there's any danger coming your way, I'll wake up like clockwork, just like last time.
Well, unless there's nothing that can even remotely challenge you.
In that case, I probably won't... wake... up...
Mmm... Yummy, yummy!
Hello? Are you with me? {PlayerName}, you seem a bit distracted.
With so much delicious food right in front of you, aren't you gonna try any? Well if you're not interested, I'll gobble it all up!
You've been absent-minded the whole day. Still bothered by that dream from last night?
Wait, so you had a dream about the Sentinel? Like the one from your flashback when we saw the Sentinel statue after you lost your memory?
Hang on, let me get this straight... The Sentinel swooshed you off to a mountain shaped like a dragon...
And then there were all these bad things going on with lots and lots of Tacet Discords, but the Sentinel saved the day!
How exactly did it protect everyone again... Oh, in your dream it made the time different there?
It's no shock that you have awesome powers, being friends with me.
Hmm... What was that place you dreamed about called?
Mt. Firmament? Never heard of it...
Hold on! Did you just say Mt. Firmament?!
The southeast...
The past few days, especially this morning, I caught this unique smell from the southeast. From that mountain they just mentioned.
It's like a strong energy pulsing through the air, but I can't quite put my finger on it. It feels kind of weird though, doesn't smell natural...
Could it have anything to do with what you said? A place where time passes slowly?
Hmm... Do you wanna go check it out?
Then... Shall we go check it out together? It feels really suspicious.
Whoa... What... What's wrong?!
{PlayerName}, who's bullying you?!
Is it you, big thing?! Huh?! How dare you, I'm gonna teach you a le...
Hmm? Wait, pause... I don't think it has any bad intentions... It smells like the "unnatural" smell I smelled in Jinzhou before...
Ooh, so you must be that Sentinel! Hehe, hello there big one!
{PlayerName}, why didn't you wake me up earlier? I've got a feeling I missed out on a lot of fun!
Over there. But the traces are kinda messy. They feel unsteady too...
Should we go now?
Hmm...? You rang?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Whoa! Check it out! Our frequencies got split apart.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Basically, we're sorta in that "hover mode" you once joked about. Nothing new to me though.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Yeah. Sorta, kinda.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Say, it's really faint so I barely noticed earlier... Is that a Threnodian smell I'm getting from ya?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It's not an exact one-to-one with that big "Ova-thracula" meatball I had, but I'd never mix up a flavor I've already tasted.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Aaaahhhhhhh! I told you to stop sticking random stuff in here!!!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Do you have any idea how messed up and humongous that frequency was? It's gonna give me indigestion!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I should ask you that! What did you do just now, huh?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I was dozing when bam! Outta nowhere a giant blue ball landed on top of me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It almost squished me!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Oh, hey! It smells just as "unnatural" as that big gigantor back in Jinzhou.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Huh? But the Sentinel isn't even here.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But why would it do that?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You don't seem too thrilled about it.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm gonna hit the sack as well.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Boy, it's so cramped in here...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Hey {PlayerName}, just now there was...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Aha, my turn to shine!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That blue thingy in your Tacet Mark totally tastes like Threnodian!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Of course not, it reeks! Just the smell alone is enough.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Like I said, it's mixed up with something. Too tough to chew.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Wh-wh-what?! Those clashing frequencies just... calmed down?!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That feels way better.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Ahhhhh... I can't hold it any longer...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You mean besides being squashed behind that blue thing? Yeah, I guess.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Listen, I figured something out about that frequency.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It's not a single frequency. It's like it's mixed up with something else, or kinda like... a piece of a cookie that's been crumbled in with everything else.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Which is why it's so hard to get a good bite!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: To see if it was a threat... I can now say with certainty that it isn't.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But since it's a crumbly mess, other than taking up space, it's pretty useless.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Will do! You can count on me one hundred percent.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: He's a tough cookie!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I wanna eat...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Eh?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: YESSS! I knew it! Professor Mornye's a real gem!
Let's get started! We can eat while we talk!
Ugh, it's so stinky!
It smells just like that giant worm you fought! Didn't we deal with it already?!
Eh? Did you guys just hear something?
Ah, I know! It wants us to give it a name.
Oh? It seems to like it.
Ugh... the smells are all mixing together. It's kinda fishy, and the texture is wet and gooey.
Hmm... the frequency that connected with you was coming from here. But now, I don't smell a thing.
Whoa, you scared me! And just now, a frequency jumped into your Tacet Mark! It felt like... some kinda connection?
Sniff, sniff, sniff...
I smell it coming from over there!
Ahhh, finally full... Hic... I think it's time for a nap.
Phew... the Dark Tide, huh? I ate some back at the hunting grounds. It tasted kinda funky... made me super sleepy. Ever since then, I've been having the weirdest nightmares...
{PlayerName}, did I... did I do something wrong?
I see... I-I can go hungry if I have to, but you, {PlayerName}, you better not get hurt...
Mmm—I've been dying for this!
Well, what do we have here? It's that Nimbus Wraith we met before. Looks like you made some new friends.
Uh-huh. Okay. I see...
So it's saying it's a combination of frequencies and there are many more just like it. This "blob of light" we're seeing now is what their complete form is supposed to look like.
Those statues were meant to absorb any Remnant Energy spill from the Inverted Tower to prevent another Dark Tide.
Sounds like they accidentally got sealed inside while goofing around. Later the shockwaves from your brawl with the Maiden must've loosened up the seal a bit.
It managed to squeeze some energy through the cracks which turned into a Nimbus Wraith looking for help.
After getting rescued by you, it immediately began searching for its friends at night, when they’re at max power and easier to find.
They really wanted to say thank you, but they were kinda in a bit of a hurry... That's why skedaddled every time after leading us to a chest.
It says that their sister taught them to learn to figure things out by themselves before causing trouble for others.
Most of them have made it out by now. But they appreciate your kindness either way!
And... as a thank you, next time we visit the tower, they'll have a surprise ready for us.
Sweet! You can bet we'll be back for that surprise!
Ugh, muggy day... Sky's gloomy, air's all wet...
Oh, man! At least let me finish my sentence!
Brrr... cold, cold, cold...
Oh right, I'm famished! We barely had a bite sprinting all the way here from Ragunna...
Whoa, pinch me! This is a feast and a half!
Hey, {PlayerName}... so, uh... we did bring enough money, right? I mean, we kinda rushed out without grabbing anything...
Hah, better get used to it. You're the champ of the Great Agon!
And you know me. If food's on offer, I'll be a scoffer. No leftovers, guaranteed!
Mmmf, yum yum...
Free stay, free meal... This Ephor really knows how to treat guests. Maybe we should, you know, hang around a bit longer.
(Sniffs) This smells amazing!
(Hiccups) Relax! We're already back in Septimont, what's the rush?
I remember Lupa said there's this weird Blightcloud hanging over the Sanguis Plateaus.
And when the "High Tide" or whatever rolls around, all the Gladiators go there to hunt Tacet Discords.
Wait, is the High Tide coming up soon? The Ephor's invite did say something about a big hunt.
Huh... that reminds me, aren't we supposed to meet her today?!
Who knows? Maybe she just wants to test her strength against you. Typical Septimontian, right?
Wait, how do you know {PlayerName} is the Champion? And all that stuff about the Ephor, too...
...Your eyes... hmm... Were we talking too loud?
Long time no see, Ragunna!
Mmm—mmm—! Can you smell that? Sweet o' Margherita's Restaurant. C'mon, c'mon, let's go stuff our faces already!
Yeah, yeah, I know. We're here to find Cartethyia!
I still can't believe Tethys couldn't unlock the Sentinel's Relic we found in Septimont...
Like some ancient data recorder, right? But Tethys said to unlock it we'll need... the Leviathan's power.
If it's really from the Sentinel, why do we need the Threnodian's power for that?
Oh well, guess that's why we need to find Cartethyia. Maybe she'll know a workaround...
The Black Shores warned that the waters in Ragunna are acting weird again. Gotta be extra careful.
And you know... something feels off in the city too. It's not as cheerful as when we left it.
Yeah, and they just threw a huge Carnevale not long ago too...
Hmm... you might be onto something.
Uh... since when did you get all poetic?
Look! Over there! Isn't that Brant and Roccia? Wow, the Troupe of Fools is putting on a show!
You're finally awake, {PlayerName}! One second I'm fine, the next my head's spinning and you're face-down on the ground...
Hm? Who's calling?
Should we hit up our friends there for a hand? They might know a thing or two about this.
Right... that makes sense.
Ahhh... it's all so quiet. Still no sign of the Threnodian.
Well, just holler if you need me.
Phew, that was exhausting...
I can't believe it! That gate sent me to some lab so, so far away!
Finally made it back... So? What happened after that? Did we win?
What? What should we do now? Let's track them down!
Huh? What's the bigger deal?
Oh... Alright. Are we heading back now?
Roger that! Your five-star Echo interpreter, at your service! Ahem... Let's try out my new emotional-adaptive mode!
Beep—loading complete! Standing by for interpretation request...
What's all the fuss about?! Easy peasy. I'll just sniff 'em out!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Sniff sniff—Found it! This one that smells like a "weenie" is the real deal! But that one? Smells like a tin can. Phony!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Ah... I'm so dizzy! What's going on?
Woo-wee. Sure is a beautiful day.
So any news from the Ephor, {PlayerName}? Or are we still chillin' like we've been for the past few days?
Me and my big mouth...
Hey, what does it say? Scooch up a bit.
Aww. You mean now?
Well, I think I'll sit this one out and leave all the heavy stuff to you guys. Hehe.
Chat for as long as you like. Just gimme me a holler if you need me.
Hic. I can't eat another bite... Hehe. That's another full stomach for Abby.
Huh? Hey, {PlayerName}. Look! Over there!
Uh... Well... You better hurry!
Same as always, call me when you need me and I'll be out in a flash!
What was that about? And that black fog... It was all mushy... I couldn't even finish it...
Hic. Oh boy, did I take a huge bite outta that one. My head's gone all swishy.
Ugh... I need a quick timeout, {PlayerName}.
Ugh... I-I can't take it!
Hmm... I'm curious...
Yeah!
Maybe it's helping us find that... um, pure Dark Tide frequency? The scent does feel clearer now, less muddled.
This is the place! The smell's getting stronger!
Y-yeah...
But my belly... Ugh... it's full...
I'm... so tired...
Both of those flavors sound really delicious, {PlayerName}! Which one do you like better?
From what Gianluca said earlier, we can probably only choose one for this week...
Sounds like a satisfying flavor that'll make your belly full, doesn't it...? Let's go find Alba and ask her if she wants to give it a try!
Hee-hee, that's the sweet tooth talking right there... That'll make up for not getting a Canned Surprise! Let's go find Chengxi and ask him if he wants to give it a try!
Uh-uh... Stuff like this is too weird to be on the cafeteria menu.
How about we write something for that suggestion box, {PlayerName}? Ask them to make something that's actually tasty...
Well, since you asked, I'll show you how it's done! But... this place is too crowded. Let's move to that open spot over there.
Alright. Ahem! All eyes on me!
W-what's going on? I... I'll try again! Just you see!
J-Just a little slip, that's all! I can do it! You gotta trust me!
Back then, I just stood in front of {Male=him;Female=her}, and that big bad Threnodian monster thing just... just... left.
Huh? No, I... I definitely did something!
Like I said, I was asleep, and then all of a sudden, I smelled something really yummy coming closer and closer… It was like nothing I ever smelled before!
I didn't have time to think. I just had to show up and reach out for it.
Hey, hey! Stop looking down on me! Like I said, it was just a little slip, really!
But think about it! I just stood there and did nothing and ended up beating a THRENODIAN! Imagine what I could do if I actually tried!
Hey, {PlayerName}! Get behind me next time we run into anything, 'kay? I'll keep you safe, promise!
You bet! I said I'm super strong. I'll protect {Male=him;Female=her}!
ABSOLUTELY NO!
I said NO! Told that poker-face researcher already!
I'll make it clear. I am to stay with {PlayerName}.
Relax, relax! You have me now, remember? Meeting up with that Jinhsi person? Getting your memories back? I've got you!
Speaking of that, so this Sentinel can predict the future? That sounds cool. The name "Jué" sounds pretty cool too. It's almost as cool as mine!
What does it look like? Where is it? Since we're paying it a visit, this Sentinel should treat us with food, right? I wonder how the food's gonna taste...
I can't help it. I'm always starving…
Oh, hey, big guy! Nice to see you again!

I still remember when you flipped over our boat last time, you know. But considering you just saved us, I'll call it even! Hmph... Like the old Jinzhou saying, something like "Big folks let little things slide!"
The big guy says that "siren" helped care for its wounds, but then she went cuckoo after sucking in too many Reverberations.
That's why it didn't want to fight her earlier. After teaching her a lesson, maybe she'll know better.
Of course it is! Look at it live and kicking. It's never been better.
It says don't beat yourself up over it.
You've been following its trail all this time, helping fishermen and receiving gifts of the sea yourself. It's trying to protect that stuff, too.
Oh! It also wants me to tell you great job on catching that big fish earlier!
"Just be yourself, whether it's giving or receiving, belief or hope," it says.
Sure we are! Nothing stands in our way when we tag team!
Uhh, what's up, big fella? Cat got your tongue?
Whoa!!!
W-W-Where do you think you're goin'? Oh, I'm so catching that whale someday. Just you wait and see!
Hey, {PlayerName}, you alright? You've been standing here for ages.
So Iuno's really gone? Just like that?
Duh! Even though I was snoozing on and off... I still remember everything that went down, crystal clear!
You told me the first time you met Iuno was in the arena, right? She scared the toga off that other team with just a few words. Intimidating stuff. But when I actually met her, she was...
Yeah, totally! We had so much done with her during the hunt trip.
